author: George Orwell
subline: It was a bright cold day in April, and the clocks were striking thirteen.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A giant eye outline. The '1984' title sits inside the eye. The pupil is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1200)" fill="none" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <!-- Eye outline: an almond shape -->
    <path d="M -800 0 Q 0 -400 800 0 Q 0 400 -800 0 Z" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Inner eye ring -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="280" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Iris -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="220" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- Pupil: RED — the all-seeing eye -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Tiny radial hairlines through the pupil, like an eye's catchlight -->
    <g stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6">
      <line x1="-40" y1="-40" x2="-20" y2="-20"/>
      <line x1="40" y1="40" x2="20" y2="20"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A giant eye outline with a RED pupil. The 540px title '1984' sits at the center, inside the eye — Big Brother is watching. Subline is the famous opening line. Centered, weight 300.
